No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no information or activities related to economic resources, social protection, or poverty reduction.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'cultivate health promotion and lifelong exercise habits' and 'greatly reduce the occurrence of sports injuries,' directly supporting Target 3.4.
evidence: 培養健康促進和終身運動的生活習慣

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with specific knowledge and skills in pickleball.
evidence: Physical Education [male and female] -- Pickleball Primer
具備參與運動的知識與技能

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course promotes efficient use of existing campus facilities (badminton courts for pickleball), an inferred link to sustainable urban planning and accessible public spaces (Target 11.7).
